output:
# Customer Revenue & Retention — The Westmore Hotel Dallas

Three retention plays designed to lift repeat-stay rate and reactivate dormant guests. All currency USD. All timestamps CT.

## Play 1 — Win-Back: Guests Last Stayed 9–18 Months Ago

**Audience:** Guests with 1+ prior stay, last departure 9–18 months ago, no opt-out.

**Offer:** "Welcome back" rate — $165 USD/night (vs. $189 BAR), valid Sun–Wed arrivals, includes breakfast and parking. Bookable through end of next quarter.

**Channels:** Email primary. SMS to opt-in subscribers as a Day-7 nudge.

**Email subject:** We miss you in Dallas — a small welcome-back gesture

## Play 2 — Project-Team Repeat Booking

**Audience:** Corporate guests with 7+ consecutive night stays in the last 6 months (consultants, medical visiting staff, contractors).

**Offer:** Book the same room type again within 60 days and lock in the prior rate + room upgrade at check-in (subject to availability).

**Channel:** Personal email from the GM, 48 hours after checkout.

## Play 3 — Birthday & Anniversary Triggers

**Audience:** Guests with birthday or stay-anniversary in next 30 days.

**Offer:** $25 USD F&B credit at the Westmore Rooftop, complimentary suite upgrade if available, late checkout to 2:00 PM CT.

**Channel:** Email 14 days prior + SMS reminder 3 days prior.

## Forecast Impact
| Play | Audience size | Conversion target | Incremental room nights | Incremental revenue |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Win-Back 9–18 mo | ~1,400 guests | 4% | 56 | $9,240 |
| Project-Team Repeat | ~80 guests | 25% | 140 | $23,100 |
| Birthday / Anniversary | ~600 guests / qtr | 6% | 36 | $5,940 |

**Total quarterly upside:** ~232 room nights, $38,280 USD.

## Measurement
Review every Monday at the leadership stand-up. Track: open rate, click rate, booking conversion, repeat-stay rate vs. control cohort. Stop any play under 1.5% conversion after 30 days; double down on anything over 5%.
